name: Stuffed Green Peppers in the Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice from top of each pepper; scoop out seeds and membrane. Parboil peppers in a small amount of boiling salted water for 3 minutes, then drain well. Stand peppers in slow cooker.
2. Shape ground beef into a large patty in a skillet; brown 5 minutes on each side. Break up the meat into small chunks.
3. Stir in pork and beans, half of the onion rings, and mustard. Spoon mixture evenly into pepper cups. Pour tomato sauce over top; cover.
4. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, until peppers are tender. Top with remaining French fried onion rings.
